top_rejected_candidates.breakout_failure_warning: 突破跟隨不足或對手方仍可解套，不得列為強突破追價。
top_rejected_candidates.failed_breakout_watch_reason: 弱突破/假突破觀察候選，不得混入 direct-buy。

rejected_candidate_summary.field_policy: top_rejected_candidates includes full PriceAction Engine fields and rejected_bucket for near-miss analysis
rejected_candidate_summary.tracking_policy: performance_audit tracks top_rejected_candidates for T+1~T+5 follow-up
